en: Alright, thank you. We will. Her teacher hasn't even seen Riley all day!
ko: 선생님이 하루 종일 라일리를 못 봤대요. 뭐? 작년에 뭘 입었지?

en: What? What was she wearing last? Do you even remember what... Riley! There you are! Thank goodness!
ko: 믿을 수가 없어. 라일리! 아, 거기 있었구나.

en: Oh, we were worried sick! Where have you been? It's so late!
ko: 다행이다. 우리 걱정 많이 했어. 어디 있었어? 너무 늦었잖아. 자기야, 무슨 일이야? 괜찮아? 응.

en: It's so funny, what happened? Is everything alright?
